events.title: Formula 1 British Grand Prix
events.note: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix takes place at the Silverstone Circuit, offering high-speed racing action and a festive atmosphere for motorsport fans.
events.marketing_angle: Highlighting the thrill and prestige of the British Grand Prix, featuring top drivers and teams competing on a historic circuit.
events.why_selected: The British Grand Prix is a significant event in the Formula 1 calendar, known for its competitive races and enthusiastic fan base.

events.title: Wimbledon 2026 Begins
events.note: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships commence, featuring top tennis players competing on the iconic grass courts of the All England Lawn Tennis Club in London.
events.marketing_angle: Emphasizing the tradition and excitement of Wimbledon, showcasing the elegance and intensity of the matches.
events.why_selected: Wimbledon is one of the four Grand Slam tennis tournaments, attracting global attention and featuring high-level competition.

events.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32
events.note: The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues with the Round of 32 matches, featuring top teams from around the world competing for a spot in the next stage of the tournament.
events.marketing_angle: Highlighting the excitement and global unity of the World Cup, emphasizing the high stakes of the Round of 32 matches.
events.why_selected: The FIFA World Cup is a major global sporting event, and its Round of 32 matches are crucial for teams aiming to advance, making it a top priority for sports enthusiasts.

events.title: Independence Day Celebrations
events.note: The United States celebrates Independence Day with fireworks, parades, and various festivities, marking the nation's 250th anniversary in 2026.
events.marketing_angle: Showcasing the vibrant and patriotic spirit of Independence Day, highlighting the 250th anniversary celebrations.
events.why_selected: The 250th anniversary of the United States' independence is a milestone event, with nationwide celebrations and historical significance.
